benefits.description: Lost 18 lbs in 3 months (196 to 178) during year 3 with GLP-1 use; total loss of 22 lbs over 3 years
Body recomposition over 3 years with fat loss and muscle gain through consistent training
Improved strength and reduced difficulty with physical tasks after TRT initiation
GLP-1 used to turn off noise from food cravings, enabling better caloric control

protocol_notes: RX prescribed TRT monitored with 2 blood tests per year; dosage adjusted by provider to maintain optimal range. 3-year protocol: Year 1 TRT only with fat loss; Year 2 added consistent gym routine with slow body recomposition; Year 3 added GLP-1 for appetite control resulting in accelerated fat loss over 3 months. Height 5'7". Focus on calorie counting, macro balance, protein intake, consistent training, sleep, and discipline.
